MEMANTO CLI - Memory commands (remember, recall, answer, daily-summary, detect-c
Store a new memory for the active agent.      Single memory:  memanto remember "
Update fields on an existing memory for the active agent.
Delete a single memory from the active agent.
Upload a file to the active agent's memory namespace.      Supported formats: .p
Search and retrieve memories for the active agent with temporal query support.
Answer a question using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
Generate a daily AI summary from session memories.
Generate the conflict report for an agent/date.      Runs the LLM conflict-detec
Interactively resolve memory conflicts for an agent.      Reads the conflict rep
